|similaritems = Phantom Dancer;Rapid Firecannon;Runaan's Hurricane;Fiendhunter Bolts;Kraken Slayer;Statikk Shiv;Yun Tal Wildarrows
|background = 
|notes = 
* {{sbc|Transcendence}} will not trigger if the user declares the attack while {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
* {{sbc|Transcendence}} will also trigger from abilities that apply on-attack effects.
* {{sbc|Transcendence's}} cooldown reduction is not granted upon {{tip|basic attack|attacking}} a [[structure]] or [[jungle plant]].
** Abilities that [[Attack_effects#Triggering_on-attack_effects|trigger on-attack effects]] ({{ai|Dirty Fighting|Akshan}}, {{ai|Lightslinger|Lucian}}, {{ai|Double Strike|Master Yi}}, {{ai|Purge|Urgot}}) will however grant cooldown reduction upon attacking structures.{{bug}}

|patchhistory = 
;[[V14.19]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2650}} from {{g|2600}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|950}} from {{g|900}}.
* Movement speed reduced to 4% from 7%.

;[[V14.15]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed an issue that caused the description to be different from the collection to in game.

;[[V14.10]] - Added
* ''Replaces {{ii|Navori Quickblades}}.''
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2600}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 40% attack speed, 25% critical strike chance, 7% movement speed.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Transcendence:}} Basic attacks on-attack reduce the '''remaining''' cooldowns of your basic abilities by 15%.
* Limited to 1 '''Navori Flickerblade'''.
}}
